title: Loop Memory feedback proposal (v2 — m-memory §5 paths 2–5)
description: Shape of one serialized FeedbackProposal emitted by the Loop Memory feedback engine (engine-kit/memory/feedback.py) at the lifecycle stage AFTER close. The engine is PROPOSE-ONLY (m-memory §5/§1.2 — 'Memory informs; it does not decide'; Constitution §1.7-D): a proposal is DATA, never an applied change. Each proposal surfaces a load-bearing suggestion derived from a MATURED (L2) memory entry along one of m-memory §5's feedback paths 2–5 (skill_edit / charter_tuning / autoloop_candidate / fold_back). Every proposal carries an explicit HUMAN gate; only L2/active entries are eligible (m-memory §4.4/§5). Path 1 (role context) is handled at ingress by the driver and is NOT a proposal. The top-level may be a single proposal or an array of proposals.

path.description: Which m-memory §5 feedback path this proposal walks. Path 1 (role context) is NOT a proposal (auto/safe ingress injection); paths 2–5 are the load-bearing, human-gated paths the engine surfaces.

target.description: What the proposal targets: a vendored-skill id (skill_edit), a charter key (charter_tuning), an Auto Loop fix-layer (autoloop_candidate), or a fold-back topic/layer (fold_back).

source_entry_ids.description: id(s) of the matured (L2) memory entry/entries this proposal was derived from. Threads the proposal back to the auditable Loop Memory record + Audit Spine (via the entry's source_loops).

rationale.description: Human-readable justification: the generalizable lesson and why it suggests this load-bearing change. Never a case-specific input→output recipe (m-memory §6.1).

gate.description: The explicit human gate every load-bearing change must clear. 'human_approval' = Auto Loop §3.3 human-approval (skill_edit / charter_tuning / autoloop_candidate). 'fold_back' = fold-back deliberation per Constitution §8 (path 5). The engine NEVER auto-applies — the gate is mandatory.

recalibration_required.description: True when adopting the proposal invalidates Acceptance judge calibration (m-memory §5 row 2; Constitution §3.6): a skill_edit to the calibration-coupled Acceptance skill REQUIRES recalibration. Default false.

maturity.description: Source-entry maturity. Only L2 (matured/confirmed) entries feed load-bearing feedback paths without re-confirmation (m-memory §4.4/§5); L1 candidates are never proposed.

provider.description: Carried for charter_tuning proposals derived from a calibration-note: calibration is per-(provider,model) (m-memory §6.2; Constitution §3.6).

model.description: Carried for charter_tuning proposals derived from a calibration-note: the model the calibration observation is tagged to (m-memory §6.2).
